name.en: France — Channel and Atlantic routing context

description.en: Channel-facing logistics for UK-exported Turkey programmes: short-sea from northern France, Atlantic ro-ro options and inland trunking that dovetails with sailing calendars.

keyword.en: France Channel short-sea UK Turkey, Atlantic ro-ro feeder Hanbros UK

text.en:
France matters to Hanbros UK when your routing crosses Calais-Dover alternatives or Atlantic sailings. Strike calendars, holiday peaks and agricultural blockades can shift motorway reliability—build buffer into critical cut-offs.

Paris and Lyon hubs are heavy on night bans for heavy vehicles; we align truck classes with local rules before locking collection times.
